cards.front: What is the purpose of recording the difference in execution time?
cards.back: To compare the efficiency of different parallel computing algorithms or implementations

cards.front: What is measured to record the difference in execution time?
cards.back: The time taken to execute a program or task on a single processor versus multiple processors

cards.front: What can be used to record the difference in execution time?
cards.back: Timing functions such as clock(), time(), or profiling tools

cards.front: What is the difference in execution time between a serial and parallel algorithm?
cards.back: A parallel algorithm will typically have a shorter execution time than a serial algorithm

cards.front: What can be a limitation of recording the difference in execution time?
cards.back: Overestimation of parallel speedup due to factors such as I/O operations or synchronization
